title: Halle, Saxony-Anhalt — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Halle, Saxony-Anhalt: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Halle is a city in Saxony-Anhalt with a population of 240,000. A historic city on the Saale River, birthplace of Handel, home to a renowned university, and a center for science and biotechnology.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
